name: Cementious Material From Agro Waste and Fly Ash
description: This project develops a sustainable cementitious material using agro waste and fly ash, combining natural fibers for strength and durability. The eco-friendly mixture offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional cement, reducing waste and improving construction efficiency.

name: Noise Proofing By Upcycling Agro Waste
description: This project develops a sustainable noise-proofing solution using agro waste, creating eco-friendly insulation that reduces noise while providing thermal and acoustic benefits. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional materials, enhancing building insulation efficiency.

name: Electricity Generating Tiles
description: This project develops a sustainable electricity-generating system using tiles embedded with solar cells, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.

name: Blending of Hydrogen in Natural Gas Pipelines
description: This project develops a sustainable hydrogen blending system for natural gas pipelines, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.

name: Biolume Aquascape
description: This project develops a sustainable biolume aquascape system using algae and microorganisms, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.

name: Industrial Pipe Cleaning Automated Machine
description: This project develops a sustainable industrial pipe cleaning automated machine using advanced robotics and automation systems, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.

name: Ink From Carbon Soot
description: This project develops a sustainable ink production system using carbon soot, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.

name: Surfactant Reomoval By Organic Matter
description: This project develops a sustainable surfactant removal system using organic matter, creating eco-friendly energy solutions for homes and buildings. The innovative approach offers a cost-effective, eco-friendly alternative to traditional energy sources, enhancing renewable energy accessibility.
